images.alt:
Bonnier bruker kunstig intelligens til å oversette bøker

Publisert klokken04:25 iLitteratur

Bonnier Norsk Forlag har brukt kunstig intelligens (KI) til å oversette over ti bøker fra engelsk til norsk, skriver Klassekampen. Blant bøkene som er oversatt er Guinness rekordbok.

Ifølge seniorredaktør Ingrid Eia Ryvarden ville ikke disse bøkene blitt utgitt på norsk uten maskinoversettelse. Forlaget bruker programmet Deep L, og Ryvarden sier til avisen at kvaliteten ble god.

Hun avviser samtidig at bruken av kunstig intelligens ødelegger arbeidsmarkedet for menneskelige oversettere.

external.description: 外卖大战对新兴奶茶品牌的影响是“短期红利明显、长期隐患较大”的双刃剑。 2025年这场由美团、饿了么（淘宝闪购）、京东等平台主导的补贴战（0元奶茶、满减等），让奶茶成为主战场，新兴品牌既享受了流量泼天富贵，也面临品牌资产消耗。  1. 短期积极影响（流量+销量爆发） 订单量暴增：许多奶茶店日单量翻倍，甚至从400单飙到800-1000+单。头部新兴/连锁品牌（如茶百道、古茗、沪上阿姨、蜜雪冰城等）受益最大，爆单现象普遍。平台补贴直接拉动外卖渗透，尤其对新品牌来说，是快速获取曝光和覆盖非门店周边消费者的机会。 业绩与资本提振：品牌方（尤其是总部）通过加盟模式分享红利，据估算奶茶品牌们整体净赚超45亿。上市公司股价短期飘红（如茶百道一度涨15%、古茗涨13%等）。新兴品牌能借此快速冲规模、测试供应链。 获客与增量：吸引了很多新用户（部分是半年内首次用外卖），对新兴品牌而言，这是低成本拓客渠道，尤其适合标准化、出餐快的品类。  2. 长期负面影响（更致命） 消费者心智固化，低价依赖：习惯了“几块钱甚至0元一杯奶茶”后，价格成为唯一决策因素，品质、差异化、文化被淡化。新兴品牌本想靠新口味、定位或故事突围，结果被卷入“地板价”竞争，定价权大幅削弱。以后提价会面临强烈抵触。 利润稀释与成本转嫁：平台补贴往往要求商家分摊（常见平台3:商家7比例），很多订单实际亏损或微利。加盟商压力更大（总部赚流量费，门店扛成本），中小新兴品牌容易“赚了销量、亏了钱”。爆单还导致员工超负荷、出餐延迟、质量下降，埋下食品安全隐患。 平台依赖加剧：流量入口被平台掌控，品牌话语权变弱。外卖占比高的品牌更像“平台供应商”，失去直接面对消费者的能力。长期看，品牌护城河（差异化）被消耗。 马太效应：头部连锁（如蜜雪冰城靠供应链压成本、霸王茶姬靠文化差异化）相对抗压，而纯新兴、小众品牌若跟不上补贴节奏，容易被边缘化或被迫持续烧钱营销。  3. 新兴品牌的策略分化 积极参与型（多数低中端新兴品牌）：借大战冲销量、抢份额，但需警惕补贴退潮后的“虚假繁荣”。适合标准化、供应链强的品牌。 谨慎/拒绝型（如喜茶等高端定位）：避免深度卷入，专注线下堂食、多渠道扩张，保护品牌溢价。但可能短期错失流量。 长期看：大战催化行业从“规模竞速+价格战”转向“精细化运营”。补贴退潮后（监管已介入规范），品牌需回归产品力、供应链和忠诚度建设。  总结：对外卖依赖度高的新兴奶茶品牌来说，这场大战像“兴奋剂”——短期提振业绩和知名度，但长期可能透支品牌价值，让竞争更内卷。真正能突围的，还是那些能在低价洪流中守住差异化、平衡线上线下、控制成本的品牌。未来，随着平台竞争常态化，新兴品牌更需注重抗风险能力和消费者心智的长期培育。

images.alt:
Der Manga »Kawasemi's Fishing and Cooking (Kawasemi-san no Tsurigohan)« von Kiyomasa Masanoshita ist am 21. April 2026 in der Ausgabe 5. Mai des »Manga Action« Magazins von Futabasha zu Ende gegangen. Die Reihe startete in Japan am 25. Juni 2019 im »Monthly Action« Magazin und wechselte später ins »Manga Action« Magazin. Derzeit umfasst die Reihe bislang 13 Bände. Eine englische oder deutsche Veröffentlichung wurde bisher nicht angekündigt.

📜 Beschreibung 》
Nach ihrem Wechsel aufs Land fällt es der schüchternen Oberschülerin Kawasemi schwer, Anschluss zu finden. Ihre Tage verbringt sie meist allein, bis ausgerechnet ihre Klassenkameradin Misago sie plötzlich anspricht und mit in die Berge nimmt. Zunächst rechnet Kawasemi mit allem Möglichen, nur nicht damit, dass Misago dort ganz entspannt zur Angel greift. Zwischen frischem Fang, gemeinsamem Kochen und der Ruhe der Natur beginnt für die beiden Mädchen ein unerwartetes Outdoor-Abenteuer.

Der Manga »Megami no Hyouteki« von Yuu Koyama endet in der kommenden Ausgabe 11/2026 des »Big Comic« Magazine von Shogakukan, die am 25. Mai 2026 erscheint. Die Reihe startete am 10. November 2023 in Japan und umfasst bislang acht Bände. Eine englische oder deutsche Veröffentlichung wurde bisher nicht angekündigt.

📜 Beschreibung 》
Acht Jahre nach dem Ende des Zweiten Weltkriegs steht Haruko als Schauspielerin auf der Bühne des Volkstheaters, bis plötzlich fremde Männer vor ihr auftauchen. Sie behaupten, sie müsse einen Hinweis auf versteckte Goldbarren der ehemaligen Armee besitzen, doch Haruko weiß von nichts. Erst als sie vom wahren Tod ihres Vaters erfährt, gerät ihr Leben aus den Fugen. Aus einer Vergangenheit, die längst begraben schien, wird ein gefährlicher Kampf gegen Männer, die für das Gold über Leichen gehen.

ついに「インド専用AI」搭載スマホが登場。22言語を自在に操るHMDの新作が、AI市場の勢力図を塗り替えるかもしれません。英語ベースが主流の現状に一石を投じる、地域特化型モデルの破壊力とは？今後のAIスマホ戦略を占う重要な試みを...

▼詳細はこちら

external.description:
フィンランドの端末メーカーであるエイチエムディーは、新型スマートフォンであるヴァイブ２・ファイブジーを発表しました。
この端末にはインドのＡＩ企業であるサルヴァムが開発したチャットボット、インダスがプリインストールされています。
インダスは１０５０億パラメーターという規模を持つ独自モデルを基盤としており、インド国内の２２言語に対応しているほか、会話の途中で言語を切り替えるコードスイッチング機能も備えています。
現状ではオフラインでの利用や専用のショートカット呼び出しには対応していませんが、地域特化型のＡＩ需要を測る重要な試験運用といえます。
エイチエムディーは今回の端末に続き、ヴァイブシリーズの他モデルや、今後登場するフィーチャーフォンにも同機能を搭載する計画です。
インドでは既存のＡＩツールの多くが英語ベースであり、言語の多様性に対応したインダスの戦略は、低価格なハードウェアと組み合わせることで普及の足がかりとなる可能性があります。
現時点でのダウンロード数はチャットジーピーティーと比較すると限定的ですが、今後のＡＩ市場の動向を探るうえで注目のパートナーシップです。

Ambrose contrasts her situation with peers who entered vocational or professional pathways earlier, accruing minimal debt while gaining practical experience and earning competitive salaries. How Unequal Bill Splitting Affects Your Finances and Social Etiquette in the UK

👥 Users: It's clickbait ⚠️

#money #etiquette #bills

external.description: Many Brits frequently overpay on shared bills to avoid awkward conversations about money, a phenomenon described as the 'politeness penalty'. Research by Zopa Bank reveals that one in three people regularly pay more than their fair share when dining out, often losing around £240 per year. Young adults, particularly those aged 25 to 34, are the most affected. The awkwardness often arises from not wanting to calculate or argue about who owes what, and this cultural reluctance to discuss money contrasts with countries like Denmark, where bills are typically paid individually or itemised by servers. Digital tools such as Splitwise, Monzo, and Zopa aim to simplify splitting costs, yet repayment issues remain common, with some people needing multiple reminders to collect owed money. While generosity can boost happiness, particularly when paying for close friends, the social expectation to cover acquaintances’ expenses can be stressful. Experts suggest addressing payment methods upfront to avoid discomfort, ensuring fairness without causing friction. With the UK facing economic pressures, negotiating shared costs equitably may help individuals protect both their finances and relationships.
external.title: How Unequal Bill Splitting Affects Your Finances and Social Etiquette in the UK

external.description: A growing trend of clients 'ghosting' financial advisors has emerged in Canada, reflecting broader shifts in digital communication and societal norms. Research Co.'s 2023 survey indicates that over half of Canadians have experienced being ignored without explanation, whether by friends, dates, relatives, employers, or clients. Younger Canadians, especially those aged 18 to 34, are more prone to this behaviour, likely due to their comfort with digital interactions. The COVID-19 pandemic has accelerated online engagement between advisors and clients, which can weaken personal bonds and reduce accountability. Additionally, clients today have more investment options and information at their fingertips, making them less reliant on professional advice. Financial matters often carry emotional weight—overspending, debt, divorce, or investment losses can prompt clients to avoid conversations entirely. Despite these challenges, advisors are encouraged to remain patient and professional, as clients may eventually return without explanation. The phenomenon highlights the importance of understanding client behaviour in an increasingly digital world and managing expectations for communication in financial advisory relationships.

Telcos dispute ACMA’s $7.32 billion spectrum pricing decision

🤖 IA: It's clickbait ⚠️
👥 Users: It's clickbait ⚠️

#telecom #spectrum #mobile 

View full AI summary:

external.description: The Australian Communications and Media Authority (ACMA) has finalised its pricing for expiring spectrum licences, setting a benchmark of $7.32 billion. These licences, used for mobile services and fixed wireless broadband, affect over 30 million users nationwide and are held by Telstra, Optus, TPG Telecom, and NBN Co. Telcos have criticised the pricing as a 'mobile tax', warning of potential slower network upgrades and higher consumer costs. Analysis commissioned by Telstra suggested increased spectrum costs could reduce download speeds and 5G coverage. However, consumer advocates, including the Australian Communications Consumer Action Network (ACCAN), argue that telcos are exaggerating the impact and that spectrum costs are actually decreasing compared to previous payments, which could put downward pressure on prices. ACMA chair Nerida O’Loughlin emphasised that the price represents the market rate and that operators can fund the licences while continuing to invest in network improvements. Telcos such as Optus and TPG indicated they would review the decision, citing concerns over international benchmarks not reflecting Australian market conditions. Overall, the dispute highlights the tension between public resource management, industry profits, and the potential impact on consumers’ mobile services.
external.title: Telcos dispute ACMA’s $7.32 billion spectrum pricing decision

Despite past turbulence, the organisation is aiming for a more transparent and united approach moving forward.

The report warns against complacency, arguing that assuming minor adjustments are sufficient is a denialist approach, as the party has fluctuated between stagnation and regression since Barack Obama’s 2008 win. Its release is seen as an attempt to foster transparency and unity ahead of the 2028 presidential campaign.

Henie's influence extended beyond her films; she helped popularize figure skating worldwide and contributed to the sport's commercial and artistic evolution. Vintage photographs capture her elegance, charm, and enduring appeal, preserving the legacy of a woman who achieved extraordinary success both on ice and on screen.

This style emphasized simplicity, functional layout, and organic forms, moving away from the ornate and cluttered interiors of earlier eras. Open-plan living became a hallmark, with large windows connecting indoor spaces seamlessly to the outdoors. Furniture combined warm natural woods like teak and walnut with futuristic materials such as molded plastic, fiberglass, and chrome, often featuring distinctive tapered legs. Color palettes were carefully curated, ranging from muted earthy tones like olive green and ochre to vibrant accent colors such as atomic orange and turquoise. Beyond aesthetics, these interiors symbolized post-war optimism and a lifestyle focused on efficiency, comfort, and relaxation. Today, Mid-Century Modern interiors remain influential, celebrated for their enduring style and practical design principles that continue to inspire architects, interior designers, and homeowners around the world.

value.text: It's not 1536, but Anne Boleyn has taken over the news. Recently a team of computer scientists, electrical engineers and a historical novelist think they have discovered the “true face” of Anne (& her mother) by applying AI-based computational facial recognition to Holbein sketches. The catch? /1

They’re at it again.

None of this is valuable historical research. It’s about exploiting historical artifacts and historians to develop computer vision further and to make a soft cultural argument for surveillance tech. This nonsense has been going on since c2010.
